subject: A dragon breathing a massive column of fire at an armored figure below, the foreground engulfed in an explosive fireball
description: The composition is dominated by fire — a vast orange-yellow fireball explosion fills most of the frame, radiating from a focal point at the lower left where an armored figure (mostly obscured by the blast) is being incinerated. A large dark dragon is visible in the upper right, wings partially spread, neck extended as it breathes a stream of fire downward. The background above the fire is a pale lavender-grey sky. The scale of the dragon relative to the human figure and the overwhelming blaze conveys total destructive force. The palette is fiery orange, gold, and red against the cooler grey sky.
foreground: Massive fireball explosion; partially visible armored figure being engulfed
background: Pale lavender-grey sky; large dark dragon upper-right
